mobile.title: Event tickets
mobile.gatewayDisabledTitle: Paid and time-credit checkout is disabled
mobile.gatewayDisabledDescription: This mobile flow supports free ticket allocation only. It never charges money or time credits and does not change your wallet.
mobile.loadFailedDescription: The event ticket catalogue could not be loaded. Try again.
mobile.noTickets: You do not have a ticket for this event.
mobile.timeCreditCancelDisabled: Time-credit ticket cancellation is unavailable in this free-only flow. No wallet action has been taken.
mobile.cancelDescription: Give a short reason. The quantity will return to the free allocation.
mobile.reasonInvalidDescription: Enter a reason of no more than 500 characters.
mobile.cancelledDescription: The quantity has been returned to the free allocation.
mobile.cancelFailedDescription: Refresh the catalogue and try again.
mobile.catalogueEmpty: No ticket types are available for this event.
mobile.timeCreditDisabledDescription: The approved wallet gateway is not connected. No credits can be debited from this screen.
mobile.registrationRequired: A confirmed event registration is required before claiming a free ticket.
mobile.notEligible: You do not currently meet this ticket type’s eligibility rules.
mobile.salesClosed: This ticket type is not currently open for allocation.
mobile.soldOut: No free tickets remain for you in this allocation.
mobile.unitsInvalidDescription: Enter a whole number between 1 and {{count}}.
mobile.allocateFailedDescription: Check your registration, eligibility and remaining allocation, then try again.
